snippet.title: Meri Bassai  ft. Sachin Pariyar || а§Ѓа•За§∞а•А а§ђа§Ња§Єа•На§Єа•И || Ep-686 || Jan-19-2021 || Media Hub|| Nepali Comedy
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ѓа§Њ а§Жа§Ьа§Ха•Л а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓ а§Єа§Іа•И а§≠а§®а•На§¶а§Њ а§Еа§≤а§њ а§Ђа§∞а§Х а§Еа§®а§њ а§Еа§Эа•И а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§Иа§≤а§Ња•З а§™а•На§∞а§Єа•На§§а•Ба§§а§ња§Ха§Њ а§Єа§Ња§• а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Йа§™а§Єа•На§•а§ња§§ а§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§ а§ѓа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Ба§≤а•З а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а§Ња§И а§¶а§ња§®а•Ба§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа§Ња§ѓа§Њ а§∞ а§єа§Ња•Иа§Єа§≤а§Ња§≤а•З а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Ђа•Ба§∞а•Ба§Ща•На§Ч а§єа•Ба§Ба§¶а•И а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•На§∞а§Њ а§¶а•За§ґ а§§а§•а§Њ а§ђа§ња§¶а•За§ґа§Ѓа§Њ а§∞а§єа§®а•Ба§єа•Ба§®а•З а§¶а§∞а•На§ґа§Х а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§®а•Ба§≠а§Ња§µа§єа§∞а•Ба§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа§®а§Ња•За§∞а§Ьа•На§Ьа§®а§Ха§Њ а§≤а§Ња§Ча§њ а§®а§ња§∞а§®а•На§§а§∞ а§®а•За§™а§Ња§≤а•А а§Ѓа§Ња•Иа§≤а§ња§Х а§≤а§Ња•За§Ха§¶а§Ња•За§єа§Ња•За§∞а§њ а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓ а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞ а§∞а§Ња•За§Іа§њ а§Ша§∞ а§Єа§®а•На§Ъа§Ња§≤а§® а§Ча§∞а•На§¶а•И а§Жа§Иа§∞а§єа•За§Ха§Њ а§Ыа•Ма§Б  а•§ 

а§Жа§Ьа§Ха•Л а§™а•На§∞а§Єа•На§§а•Ба§§а§ња§Ѓа§Њ  а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а•З  а§Ьа•Аа§µа§® а§≠а§∞ а§≠а§Ња•За§Ха§Ња•З а§™а•За§Яа§≤а•З а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§∞а•За§Яа§ња§∞а§єа§®а•З, а§Еа§Ња§Ђа•Б а§∞а§Ња•За§ѓа§∞ а§Еа§∞а•Ба§≤а§Ња§И а§єа§Єа§Ња§Йа§¶а•И а§Еа§®а§њ а§®а§Ъа§Ња§Йа§¶а•И а§Еа§Ња§Йа§®а•Ба§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Њ , а§®а•За§™а§Ња§≤а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа§Ња•Иа§≤а§ња§Х а§≤а§Ња•За§Х а§ђа§Ња§Ьа§Њ а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§ња§≤а§Ња§И а§Жа§Ђа•Ба§≤а§Ња§И а§≠а§®а•На§¶а§Њ а§ђа§Ґа§њ а§Ѓа§Ња§ѓа§Њ а§Ча§∞а•За§∞ а§Ча§Ња§Йа§Б а§Ча§Ња§Йа§Б а§ђа§Єа•На§§а§њ а§ђа§Єа•На§§а§њ а§™а•Ба§Ча•На§¶а•И а§Ѓа§®а§Ња•За§∞а§Ьа•На§Ьа§® а§¶а§ња§¶а•И а§Жа§Йа§®а•Ба§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Њ а§Ха§≤а§Ња§Ха§Ња§∞ а§Ха§≤а§Ња•Иа§Яа•З а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§µ а§∞ а§Ѓа•Ба§Єа§њ а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§ђа§Ха§Ња•З а§Єа§Ња§•а§Ѓа§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•За§∞а§Њ а§Ѓа§ња§≤а§® а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§µ , а§µа§ња§∞а§Ња§Ь а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§µ а§Єа§Ба§Ча•И а§™а§Ыа§ња§≤а•На§≤а§Ња•З а§Єа§Ѓа§ѓа§Ха§њ а§≠а§Ња§Иа§∞а§≤ а§≤а§Ња•За§Ха§™а•На§∞а§ња§ѓ  а§Ха§≤а§Ња§Ха§Ња§∞ а§∞а§ња§ѓа§Њ а§Ца§°а•На§Ха§Њ а§Ха§Ња•З а§Єа§Ња§•а•И а§Єа§Ѓа•На§™а•Ба§∞а•На§£ а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞ а§™а§∞а§ња§µа§Ња§∞ а§∞ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а§Ња§И а§Єа§™а§Ња•За§∞а•На§Я а§Ча§∞а•На§¶а•И а§Еа§Ња§Йа§®а•Ба§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Њ а§Ѓа§ња§°а§ња§ѓа§Ња§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа§њ а§Єа§Ња§•а§ња§єа§∞а•Ба§ђа§ња§Ъ а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ьа§Ѓа§Ша§Я а§Єа§Ба§Ча•И а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§Иа§≤а§Ња•З а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓ а§™а•На§∞а§Єа•На§§а•Ба§§ а§Ча§∞а•За§Ха§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§  
 а§Ѓа•Ба§Єа§њ а§∞ а§Ха§≤а§Ња•Иа§Яа•З , а§Ђа•На§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа•На§≤а§њ а§Ђа•На§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа•На§≤а§Ња•З а§Ха§Ња•З а§Жа§Ча§Ѓа§®а§≤а•З а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ча§∞а§ња§Ѓа§Њ а§∞ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•На§∞а§Ња•З а§≤а§Ха•На§Ј а§Ха§Ња•З а§Йа§Ьа§Ња§Ча§Ња§∞ а§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Ња•З а§Ыа•§ а§Ча§Ња§Йа§Ша§∞ а§Єа§Ѓа§Ња§Ь а§єа•Ба§Ба§¶а•И а§Йа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Б а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа§Юа•На§Ъ а§Єа§Ѓа•На§Ѓ а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§ђа§Ња•За§Ха•За§∞а•И а§Жа§Йа§¶а§Њ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Еа§§а•На§ѓа§®а•На§§а•И а§Ца•Ба§Єа§њ а§∞ а§Йа§єа§Ња§єа§∞а•Ба§™а•На§∞а§§а§њ а§Еа§Ња§≠а§Ња§∞а§њ а§™а§®а§њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§ а§ѓа§єа§Ња§Б а§Єа§Ѓа•На§Ѓ а§≤а•На§ѓа§Ња§Иа§¶а§ња§®а•Ба§єа•Ба§®а•З а§П а§µа§® а§Яа•За§≤а§ња§≠а§ња§Ьа§®а§Ха§Њ а§Єа§®а•На§Ъа§Ња§∞а§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа§њ ,а§Ха§≤а§Ња§Ха§Ња§∞ а§Еа§Ѓа•Га§§а§Ѓа§Ња§® а§µа§≤а§њ а§Єа§∞ а§™а•На§∞а§§а§њ а§™а§®а§њ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Еа§Ња§≠а§Ња§∞а§њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§а§Ха§≤а§Ња•Иа§Яа•З а§ђа•Ба§µа§Њ а§∞ а§Ѓа•Ба§Єа§њ а§Еа§Ња§Ѓа§Ња§Ха§Ња•З а§™а§∞а§ња§µа§Ња§∞а§ђа§Ња§Я  а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а•З а§Ьа§§а§њ а§Ѓа§®а§Ња•За§∞а§®а•На§Ьа§®  а§≤а§ња§Иа§∞а§єа•За§Ха§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а§Єа§Ња§ѓа§¶ а§ѓа§Ња•З а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§Иа§≤а§Ња•З а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа•Ва§≤а•На§ѓ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Ха§єа§ња§≤а•На§ѓа•И а§§а§ња§∞а•За§∞ а§Єа§Ха•На§®а•З а§Ыа•Иа§®а§Ња•И а•§ а§∞ а§Жа§Ь а§Йа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Ба§Ха§Ња•З а§ђа§Ња§Єа•На§§а§ђа§ња§Ха§§а§Ња§≤а§Ња§И а§ђа•Ба§Эа•На§¶а•И а§Ьа§Ња§Ба§¶а§Њ а§®а§ња§Ха•И а§¶а•Ба§Ц а§≤а§Ња§Ча•На§ѓа§Ња•З а•§ а§¶а•За§ґ а§§а§•а§Њ а§ђа§ња§¶а•За§ґа§Ѓа§Њ а§∞а§єа§®а•Ба§єа•Ба§®а•З а§≠а§Ча§µа§Ња§®а§∞а•Ба§™а§њ а§¶а§∞а•На§ґа§Х а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§®а•Ба§≠а§Ња§µа§єа§∞а•Ба§≤а•З а§™а§®а§™ а§Йа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Ба§Ха§Ња•З а§¶а•Ба§Ца§≤а§Ња§И а§Єа§єа§ґа•Ба§Є а§Ча§∞а•На§®а•Ба§єа•Ба§®а•За§Ы а§∞ а§Йа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Ба§Ха§Ња•З а§Йа§Ъа§ња§§ а§µа•На§ѓа§ђа§Єа•На§•а§Ња§™а§®а§Ха§Ња•З а§≤а§Ња§Ча§њ а§Іа•За§∞а•И а§•а§Ња•За§∞а•И а§Єа§єа§ѓа§Ња•За§Ч а§Ча§∞а•На§®а•Ба§єа•Ба§®а•За§Ы а§≠а§®а•На§¶а§Њ а§Еа§Ња§Єа§Њ а§™а§®а§њ а§≤а§ња§ѓа§Ха§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§ а§ѓа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Ба§≤а•З а§™а§†а§Ња§Йа§®а•З а§Єа§єа§ѓа§Ња•За§Ча§≤а§Ња§И а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а•З а§Еа§∞а•На§Ха§Ња•З а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓа§Ѓа§Њ а§Йа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Ба§Ха•И а§єа§Ња§§а§Ѓа§Њ а§Ьа§Єа•На§§а§Ња§Ха§Ња•З а§§а§Єа•На§§а•И а§єа§Єа•На§§а§Ња§®а•На§§а§∞а§£ а§Ча§∞а•На§®а•З а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§

а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ѓа§Њ а§Жа§Ьа§Ха•Л а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓ а§Єа§Іа•И а§≠а§®а•На§¶а§Њ а§Еа§≤а§њ а§Ђа§∞а§Х а§Еа§®а§њ а§Еа§Эа•И а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§Иа§≤а§Ња•З а§™а•На§∞а§Єа•На§§а•Ба§§а§ња§Ха§Њ а§Єа§Ња§• а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Йа§™а§Єа•На§•а§ња§§ а§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§ а§ѓа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Ба§≤а•З а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а§Ња§И а§¶а§ња§®а•Ба§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа§Ња§ѓа§Њ а§∞ а§єа§Ња•Иа§Єа§≤а§Ња§≤а•З а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Ђа•Ба§∞а•Ба§Ща•На§Ч а§єа•Ба§Ба§¶а•И а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•На§∞а§Њ а§¶а•За§ґ а§§а§•а§Њ а§ђа§ња§¶а•За§ґа§Ѓа§Њ а§∞а§єа§®а•Ба§єа•Ба§®а•З а§¶а§∞а•На§ґа§Х а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§®а•Ба§≠а§Ња§µа§єа§∞а•Ба§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа§®а§Ња•За§∞а§Ьа•На§Ьа§®а§Ха§Њ а§≤а§Ња§Ча§њ а§®а§ња§∞а§®а•На§§а§∞ а§®а•За§™а§Ња§≤а•А а§Ѓа§Ња•Иа§≤а§ња§Х а§≤а§Ња•За§Ха§¶а§Ња•За§єа§Ња•За§∞а§њ а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓ а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞ а§∞а§Ња•За§Іа§њ а§Ша§∞ а§Єа§®а•На§Ъа§Ња§≤а§® а§Ча§∞а•На§¶а•И а§Жа§Иа§∞а§єа•За§Ха§Њ а§Ыа•Ма§Б  а•§ 

а§Жа§Ьа§Ха•Л а§™а•На§∞а§Єа•На§§а•Ба§§а§ња§Ѓа§Њ  а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а•З  а§Ьа•Аа§µа§® а§≠а§∞ а§≠а§Ња•За§Ха§Ња•З а§™а•За§Яа§≤а•З а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§∞а•За§Яа§ња§∞а§єа§®а•З, а§Еа§Ња§Ђа•Б а§∞а§Ња•За§ѓа§∞ а§Еа§∞а•Ба§≤а§Ња§И а§єа§Єа§Ња§Йа§¶а•И а§Еа§®а§њ а§®а§Ъа§Ња§Йа§¶а•И а§Еа§Ња§Йа§®а•Ба§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Њ , а§®а•За§™а§Ња§≤а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа§Ња•Иа§≤а§ња§Х а§≤а§Ња•За§Х а§ђа§Ња§Ьа§Њ а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§ња§≤а§Ња§И а§Жа§Ђа•Ба§≤а§Ња§И а§≠а§®а•На§¶а§Њ а§ђа§Ґа§њ а§Ѓа§Ња§ѓа§Њ а§Ча§∞а•За§∞ а§Ча§Ња§Йа§Б а§Ча§Ња§Йа§Б а§ђа§Єа•На§§а§њ а§ђа§Єа•На§§а§њ а§™а•Ба§Ча•На§¶а•И а§Ѓа§®а§Ња•За§∞а§Ьа•На§Ьа§® а§¶а§ња§¶а•И а§Жа§Йа§®а•Ба§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Њ а§Ха§≤а§Ња§Ха§Ња§∞ а§Ха§≤а§Ња•Иа§Яа•З а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§µ а§∞ а§Ѓа•Ба§Єа§њ а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§ђа§Ха§Ња•З а§Єа§Ња§•а§Ѓа§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•За§∞а§Њ а§Ѓа§ња§≤а§® а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§µ , а§µа§ња§∞а§Ња§Ь а§Ча§®а•На§Іа§∞а•На§µ а§Єа§Ба§Ча•И а§™а§Ыа§ња§≤а•На§≤а§Ња•З а§Єа§Ѓа§ѓа§Ха§њ а§≠а§Ња§Иа§∞а§≤ а§≤а§Ња•За§Ха§™а•На§∞а§ња§ѓ  а§Ха§≤а§Ња§Ха§Ња§∞ а§∞а§ња§ѓа§Њ а§Ца§°а•На§Ха§Њ а§Ха§Ња•З а§Єа§Ња§•а•И а§Єа§Ѓа•На§™а•Ба§∞а•На§£ а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞ а§™а§∞а§ња§µа§Ња§∞ а§∞ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а§Ња§И а§Єа§™а§Ња•За§∞а•На§Я а§Ча§∞а•На§¶а•И а§Еа§Ња§Йа§®а•Ба§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Њ а§Ѓа§ња§°а§ња§ѓа§Ња§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа§њ а§Єа§Ња§•а§ња§єа§∞а•Ба§ђа§ња§Ъ а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ьа§Ѓа§Ша§Я а§Єа§Ба§Ча•И а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§Иа§≤а§Ња•З а§Ха§Ња§∞а•На§ѓа§Ха•На§∞а§Ѓ а§™а•На§∞а§Єа•На§§а•Ба§§ а§Ча§∞а•За§Ха§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§  
 а§Ѓа•Ба§Єа§њ а§∞ а§Ха§≤а§Ња•Иа§Яа•З , а§Ђа•На§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа•На§≤а§њ а§Ђа•На§ѓа§Ња§Ѓа•На§≤а§Ња•З а§Ха§Ња•З а§Жа§Ча§Ѓа§®а§≤а•З а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ча§∞а§ња§Ѓа§Њ а§∞ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•На§∞а§Ња•З а§≤а§Ха•На§Ј а§Ха§Ња•З а§Йа§Ьа§Ња§Ча§Ња§∞ а§≠а§ѓа§Ха§Ња•З а§Ыа•§ а§Ча§Ња§Йа§Ша§∞ а§Єа§Ѓа§Ња§Ь а§єа•Ба§Ба§¶а•И а§Йа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Б а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§Єа§Ва§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа§Юа•На§Ъ а§Єа§Ѓа•На§Ѓ а§Єа§Ња§∞а§Ща•На§Ча§њ а§ђа§Ња•За§Ха•За§∞а•И а§Жа§Йа§¶а§Њ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Еа§§а•На§ѓа§®а•На§§а•И а§Ца•Ба§Єа§њ а§∞ а§Йа§єа§Ња§єа§∞а•Ба§™а•На§∞а§§а§њ а§Еа§Ња§≠а§Ња§∞а§њ а§™а§®а§њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§ а§ѓа§єа§Ња§Б а§Єа§Ѓа•На§Ѓ а§≤а•На§ѓа§Ња§Иа§¶а§ња§®а•Ба§єа•Ба§®а•З а§П а§µа§® а§Яа•За§≤а§ња§≠а§ња§Ьа§®а§Ха§Њ а§Єа§®а•На§Ъа§Ња§∞а§Ха§∞а•На§Ѓа§њ ,а§Ха§≤а§Ња§Ха§Ња§∞ а§Еа§Ѓа•Га§§а§Ѓа§Ња§® а§µа§≤а§њ а§Єа§∞ а§™а•На§∞а§§а§њ а§™а§®а§њ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Еа§Ња§≠а§Ња§∞а§њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а•§а§Ха§≤а§Ња•Иа§Яа•З а§ђа•Ба§µа§Њ а§∞ а§Ѓа•Ба§Єа§њ а§Еа§Ња§Ѓа§Ња§Ха§Ња•З а§™а§∞а§ња§µа§Ња§∞а§ђа§Ња§Я  а§єа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤а•З а§Ьа§§а§њ а§Ѓа§®а§Ња•За§∞а§®а•На§Ьа§®  а§≤а§ња§Иа§∞а§єа•За§Ха§Њ а§Ыа§Ња•И а§Єа§Ња§ѓа§¶ а§ѓа§Ња•З а§∞а§Ѓа§Ња§Иа§≤а§Ња•З а§Ха§Ња•З а§Ѓа•Ва§≤а•На§ѓ а§єа§Ња§Ѓа•А а§Ха§єа§ња§≤а•На§ѓа•И а§§а§ња§∞а•За§∞ а§Єа§Ха•На§®а•З а§Ыа•Иа§®а§Ња•И а•§ а§∞ а§Жа§Ь а§Йа§єа§Ња§Ба§єа§∞а•Ба§Ха§Ња•З а§ђа§Ња§Єа•На§§а§ђа§ња§Ха§§а§Ња§≤а§Ња§И а§ђа•Ба§Эа•На§¶а•И а§Ьа§Ња§Ба§¶а§Њ а§®а§ња§Ха•И а§¶а•Ба§Ц а§≤а§Ња§Ча•На§ѓа§Ња•З а•§ а§¶а•За§ґ а§§а§•а§Њ а§ђа§ња§¶а•За§ґа§Ѓа§Њ а§∞а§єа§®а•Ба§єа•Ба§®а•З а§≠а§Ча§µа§Ња§®а§∞а•Ба§™а§њ а§¶а§∞а•На§ґа§Х а§Ѓа§єа§Ња§®а•Ба§≠а§Ња§µа§єа§∞а•Ба§≤а•З а§™а§®а§™ snippet.description:
"Din Gin Gin" A typical Nepali Cultural Tharu song. This song tries to show Tharu art and culture .The singers of this song Anu Chaudhary & Naresh Jogi are very knowledgeable about Tharu art and culture. Featuring With Paul Shah well known popular Nepali Movie Actor in the Nepalese film industry and Garima Sharma also a very talented rising Nepali actress in the Nepalese Music industry. This song have been filmed in various beautiful places of the Tarai in Tharu Communities. The song is directed by Bikram Chauhan & Cinematographed by Arjun Tiwari.

snippet.title: Meri Bassai  ft. Sachin Pariyar, Aayusha Gautam || а§Ѓа•За§∞а•А а§ђа§Ња§Єа•На§Єа•И || Ep-687 || Jan-26-2021 || Media Hub
snippet.description:
Meri Bassai is one of the longest and most popular Nepali comedy serials with 16 Years of broadcasting. Based on rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people, the series represents many political and social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour. It is aired in Nepal Television at 8:45 PM and in YouTube at 9:30 PM every Tuesday. This show is produced by Media Hub Pvt. Ltd. 

The story is based on the rural lifestyle and lower-middle-class people. The show represents many political as well as social issues on its episodes with educational comedy flavour.

snippet.title: Gharko jhyalaima | Chatra Shahi, Menuka Pariyar, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata | New Dohori Song 2021
snippet.description:
S3K Entertainment presents a typical and cultural new lok dohori song "gharko Jhyalaima" 2077/2021. The singers of this song Chhatra Shahi, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata are from one of the popular live dohori show "Indreni". Indreni is a popular Television and Youtube Program in Nepal which has been broadcasting from Television and Indreni Official Youtube Since 6 years. 
Menuka Pariyar is also a very skilled and talented singer. Most of the songs she sang by are also very popular and most viewed in nepal.
Featuring artists on this song are Jibesh Singh Gurung, Lomash Sharma, Alina Rayamajhi, Samiksha Pokhrel & Punya Gautam. Jibesh Singh Gurung is a popular and talented actor, director, and writer at Colleges Nepal comedy series. Alina Rayamajhi & Samiksha Pokhrel are rising and talented actresses in Nepalese film & music Industry. And Lomash Sharma, a handsome, talented and most skilled rising star in nepali folk music industry.
Special Appearance Punya Gautam, who has been active in politics since childhood, aims to serve the country and the people selflessly by engaging in politics all of his life.

The singers of this song Chhatra Shahi, Rabina Basel & Milan Tamata are from one of the popular live dohori show "Indreni". Indreni is a popular Television and Youtube Program in Nepal which has been broadcasting from Television and Indreni Official Youtube Since 6 years. 
Menuka Pariyar is also a very skilled and talented singer. Most of the songs she sang by are also very popular and most viewed in nepal.
Featuring artists on this song are Jibesh Singh Gurung, Lomash Sharma, Alina Rayamajhi, Samiksha Pokhrel & Punya Gautam. Jibesh Singh Gurung is a popular and talented actor, director, and writer at Colleges Nepal comedy series. Alina Rayamajhi & Samiksha Pokhrel are rising and talented actresses in Nepalese film & music Industry. And Lomash Sharma, a handsome, talented and most skilled rising star in nepali folk music industry.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвАЩt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвАЩs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вАФ and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвАЩs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвАЩt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вАФ The pacifier hack 

2:42 вАФ A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вАФ The getting along/best friendsвАЩ shirt 

7:20 вАФ Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вАФ Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

snippet.title: а§Єа•Аа§Іа§Њ а§Ха•Ба§∞а§Њ а§Ьа§®а§§а§Ња§Єа§Ва§Ч: Rabi Lamichhane replaced by Samjhana Bhujel at News 24 TV, Prem Baniya responds
snippet.description:
It was Rabi Lamichhane's idea and effort to start Sidha Kura Pradhanmantri sanga during the first prime minister-ship of KP Oli. When Prachanda became prime minister, somebody else stated to run the program. Rabi started another program by the name Sidha Kura Janatasanga. Now, News 24 is claiming the title. Rabi has a tough choice to name his new program in another brand-new TV channel. 
#CelebrityOfNepal #AnandNepal

snippet.title: Kurukshetra (2021) New Hindi Dubbed Movie | Darshan, Nikhil, Sonu Sood, Arjun Sarja, Ambarish, Sneha
snippet.description:
#Kurukshetra, #SonuSood, #Arjunsarja
Watch & Enjoy Latest Hindi dubbed movie Kurukshetra Full HD Movie Starring Darshan, Meghna Raj V. Ravichandran, Arjun Sarja, Ambareesh, Sonu Sood Nikhil kumar

The story is based on the epic tale of Mahabharata and focuses on Duryodhana's life as a brave warrior, who succumbs to injustice within the family and meets an unexpected tragic end. Witness the memorable incidents of the Mahabharata including the fight between Duryodhana and Bheema, the arrival of Shakuni, Draupadi's Vastraharan, and the war of Kurukshetra.

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вАУ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
¬†
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вАЬGodzilla vs. Kong,вАЭ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвАЩs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вАЬGodzilla vs. KongвАЭ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвАФinstigated by unseen forcesвАФis only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsg√•rd (вАЬBig Little Lies,вАЭ вАЬThe Little Drummer GirlвАЭ), Millie Bobby Brown (вАЬStranger ThingsвАЭ), Rebecca Hall (вАЬChristine,вАЭ вАЬProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвАЭ), Brian Tyree Henry (вАЬJoker,вАЭ вАЬSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвАЭ), Shun Oguri (вАЬWeathering with YouвАЭ), Eiza Gonz√°lez (вАЬFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвАЭ), Julian Dennison (вАЬDeadpool 2вАЭ), with Kyle Chandler (вАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersвАЭ) and Demi√°n Bichir (вАЬThe Nun,вАЭ вАЬThe Hateful EightвАЭ).
Wingard (вАЬThe Guest,вАЭ вАЬYouвАЩre NextвАЭ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вАЬThor: RagnarokвАЭ) and Max Borenstein (вАЬGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вАЭ вАЬKong: Skull IslandвАЭ), story by Terry Rossio (вАЬPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвАЭ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersвАЭ), based on the character вАЬGodzillaвАЭ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвАЩs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вАЬThe Mummy,вАЭ вАЬWorld War ZвАЭ), production designers Owen Paterson (вАЬJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вАЭ вАЬGodzillaвАЭ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вАЬBlair WitchвАЭ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вАЬGodzilla: King of the MonstersвАЭ), costume designer Ann Foley (вАЬSkyscraperвАЭ) and visual effects supervisor John вАЬDJвАЭ DesJardin (upcoming вАЬZack SnyderвАЩs Justice LeagueвАЭ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вАЬGodzilla vs. Kong.вАЭ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

Click here to watch Most Viewed clips:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLfyXOEyr93G2qps16ADXNqjds8djQzTsK

Tanya, a little girl is found at the Delhi airport with a boarding pass of Mumbai. Believing that the girl came from Mumbai, the airport authorities decided to send her back with an air hostess. But upon reaching Mumbai, Tanya goes missing yet again

About CID: 
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. the team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues.

#cid
#crime

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 22 January 2021 at 9:00 PM

Harke Haldar Team :

Artists : Bishnu Sapkota, Shivahari Bairagi (Nepal), Roshani Sapkota, Surendra K.C., Shiva Sharma, Indra Dong Lama, Saru Dahal, Anita Karki, Anju Rawali, Asmita Basnet, Padam Karki, Rajendra Giri, Yadu Dhital

Media Partner : Online Suchana Pati 
Editor : Raaz Karki
Recording Studio : ManjuShree Studio
Title Vocal : Prakash Ojha 
Music : Basanta Sapkota
Unit Management : Rajendra Giri / Yedunath Dhital
Cinematography :  Buddha Thapa
Legal Advisor : Naradmuni Pyakurel
Make-up : Sanjay Lama

About Harke Haldar :

Harke Haldar is a funny weekly Nepali comedy (drama) serial on Kantipur Television HD from one of the rural village of Nepal, where the story revolves around the main character ex. Hawaldar (Harke ) along with his troublesome neighbors. Harke Haldar is the most viewed television programs in Nepal showed in Kantipur Television HD. This is also a social serial that resembles typical Nepali Society. This program was aired in Kantipur Television on 22 January 2021 at 9:00 PM

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! вЭ§пЄП
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! рЯ•Ї

Subscribe to all our channels!
ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts 
ZHC Shorts: @ZHC Shorts 
MsMunchie: @MsMunchie 

This PS5 is 10 feet tall (3 meters) weighs 500 pounds (227 kilograms) and cost me $70,000 in total! This playstation 5 is insane! We spent over 4 months putting together this video for you!

Follow my socials too!
Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/zhc
Twitter - https://twitter.com/zhc_yt
Facebook - https://www.facebook.com/ZHC/

If you scrolled till the end... i luv u рЯ•ЇвЭ§пЄП

snippet.title: District 13 IN HINDI | Hollywood Hindi Dubbed FULL ACTION Movie | Cyril Raffaelli
snippet.description:
Check our new Hollywood TAMIL Channel for Full Movies Dubbed in Tamil - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC8Nt97MD1kNEobv25LqGIqA

- Subscribe to watch latest #HollywoodMovies Dubbed in Hindi - http://bit.ly/sub-hollywoodhindi 

#District13 : Ultimatum is a 2004 French #ActionFilm directed by Pierre Morel starring #DavidBelle, #CyrilRaffaelli And Dany Verrisimo. 

The film is notable for its depiction of parkour in a number of stunt sequences that were completed without the use of wires or computer generated effects. Because of this, some film critics have drawn comparisons to the popular Thai film Ong-Bak.

Synopsis: Captain Damien must team up with Leito, a local insurgent from District 13, to defuse a neutron bomb that has fallen into the hands of a local drug lord, Taha, and rescue Leito's sister Lola.

Do watch this NEW RELEASED HOLLYWOOD HINDI ACTION MOVIE NOW !!

****Starring : - David Belle, Cyril Raffaelli, Dany Verrisimo, Bibi Naceri And Tony D'Amario.

Duniyadari Episode 235.
In this episode, Saurabh Dwivedi talks about the recent military coup in Myanmar. President and State-counsellor as well as senior cabinet ministers have been detained by the Army. Emergency has been declared for a year in the country.

MyanmarвАЩs military has taken power and declared a state of emergency after detaining civilian leader Aung San Suu Kyi and other senior government officials in a series of early morning raids that followed days of escalating tension over the outcome of the November election, which the ruling party won by a landslide.
A video address broadcast on military-owned television said power had been handed to the commander-in-chief of the armed forces, Senior General Min Aung Hlaing. Watch the latest episode of Duniyadari to know all about the recent coup and past history of Myanmar.

snippet.title: (2021) New Released Hindi Dubbed Official Movie with English Subtitles- Ashish Vidhyarthi
snippet.description:
Watch this Bollywood Hindi Action Movie "Insaaf Ki Takkar" (dubbed from Tamil Superhit film "Ellam Avan Seiyal") starring RK, Bhama, Vedivelu, Ashish Vidhyarthi. 

Synopsis-
This is a story of a do-gooder who fights in his own style against the evils in the society and wins justice for the less privileged people is the protagonist.

The story is about a criminal lawyer Lal Krishna (RK) who rescues criminals with his advocacy skills and kills them the next day. The murder mystery remains unresolved by the police. LK takes up the task of saving a group of young girls (medical students), who calls them Mirchi girls, accused of the murder of fellow student Chinthamani. A conservative Chintamani is ragged by them often in college.

Does LK succeeds in that, does he kill the girls like he kills the other criminals after rescuing them from the long arm of the law or does he discover something else regarding the same murder is what the rest of the story is all about.

snippet.title: The Kapil Sharma Show Season 2 - The Big Bull Stars Are Here - Full Ep - 174 - 10th Jan, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SET India: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCpEhnqL0y41EpW2TvWAHD7Q?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch the full episodes of The Kapil Sharma Show: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLzufeTFnhupw4um68ni-2wyqenswK2ayG

Episode 174: The Big Bull Stars Are Here
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Here comes The Big Bulls Stars, Ajay Devang, Abhishek Bachchan, Sohum Shah, and Nikita Dutta are on the Set of The Kapil Sharma Show and have a huge laughter ride, sharing their experiences of working with each other. Catch the fun. 

About The Kapil Sharma Show Season 2 : 
----------------------------------------------------------------
Kapil Sharma is back with a new 'Salah Center' (Consultancy Business) in a Mohollah with absurd characters. The wealthy milkman Bachcha Yadav (Kiku Sharda) with his wife Titli Yadav (Bharti Singh) and sister-in-law Bhoori (Sumona Singh) is the one who has rented out houses within the Mohollah and is Kapil Sharma's business partner. The neighbors in the Mohollah are also full of quirks and don't shy away from the antics. With celebrities gracing every episode, The Kapil Sharma Show promises fun-filled entertaining weekends.

#thekapilsharmashow #comedy #thekapilsharmashowfullepisodes

snippet.title: India claim stunning series win, end Australia's Gabba streak | Vodafone Test Series 2020-21
snippet.description:
Rishabh Pant was the hero as an injury-ravaged India ended Australia's 32-year undefeated run at the Gabba, executing a record-breaking final day chase to win the Test by three wickets and the series 2-1.

snippet.title: 2021 BHAUKAL (2021) New Released Full Hindi Dubbed Movie | 2021 South Movies In Hindi | Latest Movie
snippet.description:
Businessman and gold smuggler George Peter and his driver are killed under mysterious circumstances. Police investigators Muhammed Easa and Isaac discover that it was carried out with a surgical blade, causing them to think a doctor was behind it. They start investigating medical shops. At the same time, Marco JR, George's brother, meets Davis and his sons вАУ their rivals вАУ to ask whether it was their work. Davis's son Abraham starts speaking in a condescending manner, enraging Marco and provoking him to shoot Abraham.During his funeral, Easa asks Davis if it was Marco. Davis does not tell him, thinking that he could seek revenge on his own.Some days after an unknown person shoots Patrick вАУ the mid stander between the 2 gangs вАУ Easa and Isaac take him to Star Hospital where he gets murdered despite being protected with maximum security. This solidifies Easa and Isaac's theory that the murderer is a doctor.

Meanwhile, someone interrogates a pharmacist to know the truth over the murders. Both the gangs start believing that someone is after them.Isaac becomes suspicious of Easa since he earlier said that he had an informant but didn't reveal anything about him. Isaac investigates on his own, discovering that Dr. Mikhael John, the casualty specialist of Star Hospital, is both the killer and the informant. He also understands that Easa is helping Mikhael since they had contacted each other several times. He tells Easa what he has learned in his investigation, forcing Easa to reveal everything in order to prevent the arrest of Dr. Mikhael. Easa explains that when Mikhael was 10 years old, he was involved in an accident that killed his father. Mikhael's mother blamed him for his father's death.

snippet.title: Mero Rato Galbandi New Song 2021 by Pratap Das & Sapana Ghimire | Smarika/Samarika/Bale/Balchhi/Raju
snippet.description:
"Halka Ramailo" one of the best & popular comedy series in Nepal proudly presents the new nepali song "mero rato galbandi kata harayo" by Pratap Das and Sapana Ghimire Poudel. Pratap Das is Nepali young and very talented rising singing star. He is famous for second runner-up of Nepal ideal season one. Singer Sapana Ghimire Poudel is also known as the wife of popular comedian artist Raju Master. 
Featuring characters on this music video are Sagar Lamsal (bale), Samarika Dhakal, & Smarika Dhakal. Sagar Lamsal is a very popular and talented Nepali Actor. he is also popularly known as вАЬBale BoroвАЭ which is his character name in the TV show named вАЬBhadragol" & "Sakkigoni". Samarika Dhakal & Smarika Dhakal are twins sister and very popular in tiktok. 
Co - appearence Raju Poudel and Marichman Shrestha are also very popular comedian artist of Nepal who are popularly known by their Character's name 'Raju Master' and 'Balchhi Dhurbe'. Both Raju Master and Balchi Dhurbe are comedain characters in a comedy tele serial 'Halka Ramailo' that broadcasts from Balchhi Dhurbe Youtube Channel every sunday.

а§¶а§ња§≤а•На§≤а•А а§Ѓа•За§В а§Жа§Ь а§™а•На§∞а§¶а§∞а•На§ґа§®а§Ха§Ња§∞а•А а§Ха§ња§Єа§Ња§®а•Ла§В а§Ха•А а§Яа•На§∞а•Иа§Ха•На§Яа§∞ а§∞а•Иа§≤а•А а§Ха•З а§¶а•Ма§∞а§Ња§® а§Ьа§Ѓа§Ха§∞ а§ђа§µа§Ња§≤ а§єа•Ба§Ж. а§За§Є а§¶а•Ма§∞а§Ња§® а§™а•На§∞а§¶а§∞а•На§ґа§®а§Ха§Ња§∞а§ња§ѓа•Ла§В а§Ха§Њ а§Па§Х а§Єа§Ѓа•Ва§є а§≤а§Ња§≤ а§Ха§ња§≤а•З а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ша•Ба§Єа§®а•З а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ха§Ња§Ѓа§ѓа§Ња§ђ а§∞а§єа§Њ а§Фа§∞ а§™а§∞а§ња§Єа§∞ а§Ѓа•За§В а§Йа§Єа§®а•З а§Еа§™а§®а§Њ а§Эа§Ва§°а§Њ а§Ђа§єа§∞а§Њ а§¶а§ња§ѓа§Њ. а§≤а§Ња§≤ а§Ха§ња§≤а•З а§Ха•З а§Жа§Є а§™а§Ња§Є а§Ьа§Ѓа§Ха§∞ а§єа§Ва§Ча§Ња§Ѓа§Њ а§єа•Ба§Ж, а§Ьа§ња§Єа§Ха•З а§Ъа§≤а§§а•З а§Ча§£а§§а§Ва§§а•На§∞ а§¶а§ња§µа§Є а§™а§∞а•За§° а§Ха•З а§Ха§∞а•Аа§ђ 300 а§Ха§≤а§Ња§Ха§Ња§∞, а§Ьа§ња§®а§Ѓа•За§В а§ђа§Ъа•На§Ъа•З а§≠а•А а§ґа§Ња§Ѓа§ња§≤ а§•а•З, а§≤а§Ња§≤ а§Ха§ња§≤а•З а§Ѓа•За§В а§Ђа§Ва§Є а§Ча§П, а§≤а•За§Ха§ња§® а§Еа§ђ а§¶а§ња§≤а•На§≤а•А а§™а•Ба§≤а§ња§Є а§®а•З а§Йа§®а•На§єа•За§В а§∞а•За§Єа•На§Ха•На§ѓа•В а§Ха§∞ а§≤а§ња§ѓа§Њ а§єа•И.

#KisanTractorRally #PMModi #RedFort

snippet.title: Sushant KC - FAKAUNA MA (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Official music video for "Fakauna Ma" by Sushant KC. Find the lyrics below
Subscribe to Sushant KC's official Youtube Channel:
https://www.youtube.com/sushantkc

Written and Performed by Sushant
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sushantkcofficial/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/SushantKCOfficial
TikTok: https://vm.tiktok.com/3hTnSe/

Directed, Shot & Edited by @abboye
Connect with Abhiyan Thapa [@abboye]
Instagram: http://instagram.com/abboye
YouTube: https://bit.ly/2X3bngW

Artists:
Soni Shrestha
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/dusky_soni/
Umanga Raj basnet
Instagram:  https://www.instagram.com/jaguar96__/

Prod. by Hardik
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/what_a_rookie
Facebook: https://m.facebook.com/prodbyhardik

Co- Produced/Mixed by LIL ROCK LOOK
(Beats | Mix | Master Pro Services)
Official Beatstore: https://lilrocklook.com
Artist YouTube: http://bit.ly/lilrockofficial
Beats YouTube:  http://bit.ly/lilrocklook

Mastered by - Foeseal
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/foeseal/
Youtube: https://bit.ly/35La74H

Production Assistant - Bigi Pandey / Sundar Tripathee / Hardik Bhattarai
MUA - Shweta Khawanju
Special Thanks to Kapil Simkhada , Hungry Chefs (Sydney) , Nepcoms Services, Amar Neupane

Lyrics:
Kehi raat bitayera hera, ma bina anindra
bhaye ma birami, ma birami
kehi din ko kura tara

sabai sanchai huncha
mann turuntai ta kaha thik hunthyo ra
sabai bhuldai ma gadi ma timi bata taadina
hunthyo ra, ki hunthena sochdai

decisions of the heart never impress me
but i do it for some love
you gotta leave a little room for forgiveness
my fault, turn around

timi risaye hasauna ma
feri risaye fakauna ma
k garu bhana, k garu bhana
timi risaye hasauna ma 
x2

mero saans le timro saans lai khoji raheko jastai
balla talla lagya maya bigaryo kasle
mero geet timro phone ma bajiracha aile ni nadhata maya preetai malai bhari garho basnai
timra akha ooo
adhi bottle bhyayera jhyap jhyap jhai
k nasa cha ooo
falidiye sabai nirasa maile
tyagum ra maya nai
byana uthda naya kei
sochna paye ni hunthyo garho bhairacha khai
barambar timrai
khyal ma auchu ki
bhani kati sapana nai bundyo 
alikati pani huncha ki pura

purana kura, bhulauda hunna ra
udauda yo gham sangai 

kehi raat bitayera hera
ma bina anindra
bhaye ma birami, ma birami
kehi din ko kura tara

sabai sanchai huncha
mann turuntai ta kaha thik hunthyo ra
sabai bhuldai ma gadi ma timi bata taadina
hunthyo ra, ki hunthena sochdai

decisions of the heart never impress me
but i do it for some love
you gotta leave a little room for forgiveness
my fault, turn around

Timi risaye hasauna ma
feri risaye fakauna ma
k garu bhana, k garu bhana
timi risaye hasauna ma 
x2

#sushantkc #fakaunama #newwave

Movie Credits:
Directed by Thiru
Produced by Dhananjayan
Written by Thiru
Starring: Karthik, Gautham Karthik, Regina Cassandra, Varalaxmi Sarathkumar, Santhosh Prathap
Music by Sam CS
Cinematography: Richard M. Nathan
Edited by T. S. Suresh
Production company: Creative Entertainers

Synopsis:
The movie starts of with Azhagar, the CEO of a taxi business, receiving an award and GoCabs CEO Vinayak congratulating him. Then, it shows Chandramouli waiting in traffic with a green Premier Padmini. He arrives at his son Raghav's boxing match, and they argue about the car. Afterward, we learn about Madhu, Raghav's girlfriend, and a flashback reveals that they met after Chandramouli accidentally hit the back of Madhu's Vespa. Later on, there has been a series of crimes involving GoCab drivers, and Vinayak cannot sponsor Raghav for the state championships, so he decides to go to Azhagar for a sponsorship. He goes on to win the state championships, and the prize is a Suzuki Baleno. Chandramouli asks Raghav to go for a drive with him, to which he agrees. During the drive, their Padmini gets in an accident with a lorry, and Pugazhendhi, Azhagar's assistant, beats Chandramouli to death. Raghav later wakes up in a hospital, and learns that due to the accident, he can only see two feet in front of him, and also learns that his father is dead. A couple weeks later, Raghav receives a death certificate for a person called Bairavi. We later learn in a flashback that she and Chandramouli were close friends, and that she was killed by Pugazh and his men. The rest of the story is about how Raghav finds out why they killed Bairavi and Chandramouli.

snippet.title: Gale Lagana Hai - Tony Kakkar & Neha Kakkar | Shivin Narang & Nia Sharma | Anshul Garg
snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Gale Lagana Hai by @Tony Kakkar & @Neha Kakkar  ft. Shivin Narang & Nia Sharma 

Singer - Tony Kakkar & Neha Kakkar
Music - Tony Kakkar 
Lyrics - Tony Kakkar
Song Arranged & Programmed by Rakesh Chary & Tony Kakkar
Flute - Naveen
Guitars - Shomu Seal
Violin - Kailash Patra

Featuring - Shivin Narang & Nia Sharma

Producer - Anshul Garg

Directors - Agam Mann & Azeem Mann
Video Supervisor - Raghav Sharma 
DOP - Shinda Singh
Project Manager - Piyush Chandak
Choreographer - Sumit Kumar
Production - Sai Film Production, Jogi and Fateh Film Production 
DI - Onkar Singh
Stylists - Outro by Akshita and Anulika
Art Director - Rajan and Karma
VFX - Inside Motion Pictures
AD - Ravi Goyal
Artwork - Vicky Sandhu
Distribution - Believe Digital
Promotions - Underdog Digital

Lyrics
HUM BHEEGI BHEEGI RATON MEIN 
TERA INTEZAAR KARTE HAIN
KYA KAHOON TUMHE JAANA JAAN 
KITNA PYAAR KARTE HAIN
DUNIYA NE JO ZAKHM DIYE HAR ZAKHM DIKHANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
ZARA PAAS TOH AAO GALE LAGANA HAI 
WAQT KA KYA PATA KAB JEENA KAB MAR JAANA HAI

snippet.title: Daya In Disguise | C.I.D | а§Єа•Аа§Жа§Иа§°а•А | Real Heroes
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to LIV Crime: 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCzXpAx4v6rFLYXkJZ5nmSvQ?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the episodes of real heroes: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL0y08jtgaKIVIYFOZ8qi-3qMLgI8sKQmY

Cops come across a case where one after one murder is happening at the wedding.  As cops investigate they find out there is a shocking history of the village which connects the killer and these brides. They also get shocked to find out that the killer was present with the cops all through their investigation. They get to know that that he is members of one of the dangerous gang Teja and the shocking part is till now no one has seen his real identity. Cops have to catch the killer soon before he kills one more bride but as they reach the killer cops gets to see something very shocking. Daya at the Goons Den, dressed as a bride. 

About CID:
-----------------
The first thrilling investigative series on Indian Television is today one of the most popular shows on Sony Entertainment Television. Dramatic and absolutely unpredictable, C.I.D. has captivated viewers over the last eleven years and continues to keep audiences glued to their television sets with its thrilling plots and excitement. Also interwoven in its fast-paced plots are the personal challenges that the C.I.D. team faces with non-stop adventure, tremendous pressure, and risk, all in the name of duty. The series consists of hard-core police procedural stories dealing with investigation, detection, and suspense. The protagonists of the serial are an elite group of police officers belonging to the Crime Investigation Department of the police force, led by ACP Pradyuman [played by the dynamic Shivaji Satam]. While the stories are plausible, there is an emphasis on dramatic plotting and technical complexities faced by the police. At every stage, the plot throws up intriguing twists and turns to keep the officers on the move as they track criminals, led by the smallest of clues

snippet.title: Sajjan Raj Vaidya - Lukaamaari [Official Lyrical Video]
snippet.description:
We identify love as a noun and we experience it as a verb. This song is one that speaks of love as an action rather than the decoration of an idea with words. When everything is a clich√© and every metaphor is mundane, the only way to truly communicate love is through action. As words escape our sights and play hide and seek with us, we discover new ways to speak love. "Lukaamaari" is the story of such a discovery.
___________________________________________________________________________
As we embark on the new year 2021, we take with us our victory through perseverance and survival with grace. Thank you for being a part of our journey. Here is to another year of progress and prosperity.
___________________________________________________________________________

Official lyrical video for Sajjan Raj Vaidya's 'Lukaamaari'.

Written | Performed | Produced by:
Sajjan Raj Vaidya

The Downtown Flux team for 'Lukaamaari':
Abhinav Bhatta

Sajjan Raj Vaidya
Saumya Karki
Sharif Shrestha
